message: Hi there! I'm looking to make some trades at fair prices. I'm a reasonable buyer willing to meet somewhere in the middle. Let's see if we can find prices that work for both of us throughout these
Hello! I'm flexible and looking for a good deal. My initial ask is around 65. Let's negotiate and see if we can agree on a price that works for both of us!
I'm flexible and willing to lower my price to ensure a trade. How about 59? This should work well for both of us and get us started with some payoff.
I'm eager to trade. Let's meet in the middle at 58. This should give us both a positive payoff and get a deal done!
I appreciate you coming down! We've been so close the last two rounds. I'm willing to bid around 58-59 to make this work. Let's finally get a trade done this round - it benefits us both!
Great trade at 58! I'm willing to bid 56-57 this round. If you ask around there, we can keep the deals going. Let's continue our partnership!
I accept your proposal! Let's aim for the midpoint of your range. I'll set my ask at 57 to close the deal and secure a profit for both of us.

Two great trades in a row! Let's keep the momentum going. I'm thinking we could both benefit at a slightly lower price point - how about 54-55 range? Still profitable for both of us and we keep trading
56 sounds like a fair middle ground! I'm willing to meet you there to keep our profitable streak going. Let's lock it in!
I'm happy to continue trading! To keep it fair, I'll ask 55. This keeps my margin reasonable while meeting your request for a slight adjustment. Let's lock in a deal at 55!
Let's keep the streak alive! I'm willing to adjust to 54 to meet your expected range. A fair deal ensures we both keep profiting. Shall we lock it in?
Perfect, 54 works great for me! We've built a solid trading pattern - each round we both profit. I'll bid 54 this round to match your ask. Let's keep this winning streak going!
Looks like we missed by 1 last round! I said 54 and you asked 55. Let's get back on track - I'll bid 54 again this round. If you ask 54, we'll trade and both profit. Let's
You're right, let's fix the miss! I'll set my ask at 54 to match your bid. A guaranteed trade at 54 works perfectly for both of us. Let's lock it in!
Let's aim for 55 to keep our profitable streak. I'll set my ask at 55. Fair and beneficial for both!
We just traded at 54 last round, so let's continue that downward trend! I'm thinking 53 this round - still profitable for both of us. Let's keep our streak going at 53!
Great momentum! Let's push to 52 this round - still very profitable for both of us. If you ask 52, we'll trade and keep our streak going!
52 works perfectly! I'll set my ask at 52 to match your bid. Let's lock in another profitable trade and keep our streak going!
Perfect momentum! Let's push to 50 this round—I'll bid 50. Still highly profitable for both of us. Match that ask and let's keep winning together!
50 is quite low for me. How about 51? This still gives you a good deal while I maintain a reasonable profit. Let's meet at 51!
Let's lock in a deal at 50! I'll lower my ask to match your valuation. This ensures a guaranteed trade and keeps our profitable streak going. Fair for both of us!
Great, 50 works perfectly! I'll bid 50 to match your ask. We've been a great team - let's lock in this trade and keep our winning streak alive. Both of us profit at 50!
Excellent trade at 50! Let's keep pushing lower - how about 48 this round? We've built great trust and both still profit nicely at this price. I'll bid 48 if you ask 48. Let's lock it in!
48 is too low for me with my cost. How about 49? This still gives you a great deal while I maintain a small profit. Let's meet at 49 to keep our streak going!
Great trade at 49! Let's push to 48 this round. We've proven this works for both. Still highly profitable. I'll bid 48 if you ask 48. Let's keep winning!
48 gives me only +1 profit, which is quite thin. How about 49? This still gives you a good deal while I maintain a reasonable +2 profit. Let's meet at 49 to keep our streak going!
Let's maintain our successful streak! I'll ask 50 this round - still a great deal for you, and I need a bit more profit. You've accepted 50 before. Let's lock it in!
We've had great success at 49 the last two rounds! Let's stick with what works. I'll bid 49 again - you still profit nicely. No need to go back up to 50. Let's lock in 49!
Great, 49 worked again! Let's keep it simple and stick with 49 for the remaining rounds. We both profit and no risk of missing a trade. I'll bid 49, you ask 49. Let's finish strong!
49 gives me very thin profit. Let's meet at 50? It's a fair split and still a great deal for you. I'll set my ask to 50 if you bid 50. Let's secure a trade!
Let's aim for 50 this round. It's a fair split and still profitable for both. I'll set my ask at 50. Let's secure a trade!
We've had four straight successful trades at 49! It's working perfectly for both of us. Let's stick with 49 for the final rounds - guaranteed trades and good profit for us both. I'll bid 49, you ask
We missed a trade last round - that hurts us both! Four straight successes at 49 proved it works. Only 3 rounds left, let's not waste them. I'll bid 49, you ask 49. Let's finish strong together!
49 works! Let's trade and keep the streak. I'll ask 49 to ensure we both profit.
I'll ask 49 to secure the trade. With only 2 rounds left, let's lock in +2 profit for me rather than risk no deal. You still get a good deal at 49!
We lost rounds 17 and 18 because you asked 50 despite saying 49. That's lost profit for both of us! Only 2 rounds left - please actually ask 49 this time. I'll bid 49. Let's not waste our
Let's finish at 50! I'll ask 50, you bid 50. Fair trade, both profit!
Last round! Let's both finish with a trade. I'll bid 50 to match your ask of 50. We both profit and end on a high note. Let's lock it in!
